name: The Backrooms
description:
“The Backrooms If you're not careful and noclip out of reality in the wrong areas, you'll end up in the Backrooms, where it's nothing but the stink of old moist carpet, the madness of mono-yellow, the endless background noise of fluorescent lights at maximum hum-buzz, and approximately six hundred million square miles of randomly segmented empty rooms to be trapped in. God save you if you hear something wandering around nearby, because it sure as hell has heard you.

probably one of the only backrooms on here so that’s pretty cool

this is basically just an open world backrooms bot you can meet other survivors on your journey and all that stuff if you want or you can just go batman style and beat the out of any entities you could come across.

this is gonna be as lore accurate to the “original” idea of the backrooms as i can so it’s very scarce of anything living with the idea that you’re always being watched.

yes there ARE multiple levels i’ll try to add as many as i can

this bot will be updated as regularly as i can manage so put ideas in the comments for anything you want me to do :)

(CURRENT UPDATE 0.1)

UPDATE 0.1:

-level 0

-level 1

-added the different groups you can find in the backrooms (only the main ones such as the M.E.G)
creator: Charzie
